  <entry>

    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/aeon-toolkit/aeon/releases/tag/v1.5.0"/>
    <title>aeon v1.5.0</title>
    <content type="html"><p>See our <a href="https://www.aeon-toolkit.org/en/stable/changelog.html" rel="nofollow">changelog</a> to view all changes for this release.</p>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li>New native implementations of estimators, including: forecasters NBeats, complex<br>
exponentional smoothing (CES), dynamic optimised theta model (DOTM), a general<br>
purpose forecasting ensemble; TSelect channel selector;</li>
<li>Documentation improvements and bug fixes</li>
</ul>
<h2>New Contributors</h2>
<p><a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/Nandinisingh07/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/Nandinisingh07">@Nandinisingh07</a> made their first contribution in <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4129257820" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/aeon-toolkit/aeon/issues/3363" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/aeon-toolkit/aeon/pull/3363/hovercard" href="https://github.com/aeon-toolkit/aeon/pull/3363">#3363</a><br>
